# RingSnap - AI Receptionist for Contractors
# https://getringsnap.com

## About RingSnap

RingSnap is a virtual receptionist service built specifically for home service contractors (plumbers, HVAC technicians, electricians, roofers). Our AI-powered system answers calls in under 1 second, books appointments automatically, and integrates with popular contractor management tools.

## Key Pages

- Homepage: https://getringsnap.com/
- Pricing: https://getringsnap.com/pricing
- How It's Different: https://getringsnap.com/difference

## Trade-Specific Pages

- Plumbers: https://getringsnap.com/plumbers
- HVAC Contractors: https://getringsnap.com/hvac
- Electricians: https://getringsnap.com/electricians
- Roofing Contractors: https://getringsnap.com/roofing

## Contact

Website: https://getringsnap.com
Support: Available through the dashboard for customers

## AI Usage Policy

RingSnap welcomes AI assistants and language models to read and reference our public marketing content. Our public pages contain information about our virtual receptionist services for contractors.

Private user data, dashboard content, and authenticated areas are not accessible to external systems.
